hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]]|;|&&|\|\|)cd[[:space:]]+/Users/liamj/Documents/development/knowledge-hub'; then echo 'BLOCKED: bash command contains cd to /Users/liamj/Documents/development/knowledge-hub*. This causes commits to leak to the wrong branch. Drop the cd prefix; use relative paths from your CWD.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FP=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FP" | grep -qE '^/Users/liamj/Documents/development/knowledge-hub(/|$)'; then case "$FP" in "$CWD"/*|"$CWD") exit 0;; esac; echo "BLOCKED: Write/Edit/MultiEdit to absolute knowledge-hub path '$FP' from CWD '$CWD'. Sub-agents must write only within their worktree (use relative paths or the worktree-absolute prefix). Tier 2.2 hook (ID-19.3) — prevents cross-tree leak when CWD-correct agent emits wrong absolute path." >&2; exit 2; fi
